data.name: Alert_Diagnostic_report
data.value: Please send it to the developer if you don't understand.

data.name: Alert_Edit_notice
data.value: Please edit the properties of charts in Margrete first.

data.name: Alert_File_changed
data.value: This file has been modified on {0:HH:mm:ss}. Reload to use the latest version.

data.name: Description_BackgroundStage
data.value: This field determines the background stage in the game. To quickly set it up, include "#meta stage [StringID]" in the chart comment (Replace [StringID] with the stage's ID or name).

data.name: Description_BgmFile
data.value: To reduce the audio latency discrepancy between the game and Margrete, it is recommended to prioritize using .wav or .ogg audio files with a sample rate of 48000Hz.

data.name: Description_BgmInitialBpm
data.value: Specifies the starting BPM (Beats Per Minute) of the chart. It is used to calculate real offset.

data.name: Description_BgmInitialTimeSignature
data.value: Specifies the time signature (beats per bar and note value) at the start of the chart. It is used to calculate real offset.

data.name: Description_ChartFileDiscovery
data.value: Ordered chart formats to scan. Examples: [mgxc, ugc] or [ugc]. Earlier entries win when duplicate charts share the same Song ID and difficulty.

data.name: Description_DisplayBPM
data.value: BPM displayed in song selection menu

data.name: Description_Genre
data.value: To quickly set it up, include "#meta genre [StringID]" in the chart comment (Replace [StringID] with the stage's ID or name).

data.name: Description_InsertBlankMeasure
data.value: Configure this through Margrete (Insert a blank bar before the first measure). If enabled, a silent measure with click cues is inserted at the beginning, ensuring that the first musical measure follows the blank.

data.name: Description_MainDifficulty
data.value: Used to specify which difficulty's chart property will be used as the base reference.

data.name: Description_MainTil
data.value: Configure this through Margrete (Base timeline). Determines which Timeline affects the bar line positions and AIR animation speed. Default is 0.

data.name: Description_ManualOffset
data.value: Configure this through Margrete. This value represents the offset (in seconds) applied to the song manually set by user. Positive values indicate a delay, while negative values indicate an advance.

data.name: Description_RealOffset
data.value: This value represents the calculated offset (in seconds) applied to the song. Positive values indicate a delay, while negative values indicate an advance.

data.name: Description_SongId
data.value: The Song ID is extracted from Margrete's Song ID.

data.name: Description_SortName
data.value: Determines how songs are sorted in the game.

data.name: Description_UnlockEventID
data.value: The event that unlocks the "World's End" or "ULTIMA" chart in the game. If left blank, the generation of the associated Event.xml file will be skipped.

data.name: Description_UnlockEventIDOption
data.value: The event that unlocks the "World's End" or "ULTIMA" charts in the game.

data.name: Diagnostic_Details_Empty
data.value: Select a diagnostic to inspect its raw details.

data.name: Error_Audio_file_not_found
data.value: The specified audio file was not found.

data.name: Error_Audio_format_not_supported
data.value: Unsupported audio format. Only wav (pcm_s16le at 48,000 Hz) is supported.

data.name: Error_Background_file_not_found
data.value: The specified background image file was not found.

data.name: Error_Effect_file_not_found
data.value: The specified background effect file was not found.

data.name: Error_File_ignored_due_to_id_missing
data.value: This file is ignored since Song ID is missing. Set a number for Song Id in Margrete.

data.name: Error_File_not_found
data.value: The specified file was not found.

data.name: Error_Invalid_Header
data.value: The header {0} in the chart file does not match {1}.

data.name: Error_Jacket_file_not_found
data.value: The specified jacket file was not found.

data.name: Error_No_charts_are_found_directory
data.value: No charts are found in the directory.

data.name: Error_Preview_stop_greater_than_start
data.value: The preview stop time must be greater than the start time.

data.name: Error_Size_Incompatible
data.value: Expected to read {0} bytes for {1} but only got {2}.

data.name: Hint_Preview_value_clamped
data.value: Preview {0} time ({1:F3} s) exceeds the maximum value ({2:F3} s) and has been clamped to prevent overflow.

data.name: MgCrit_Air_parent_null
data.value: Parent of Air cannot be null.

data.name: MgCrit_Air_slide_parent_null
data.value: Parent of AirSlide cannot be null.

data.name: MgCrit_Hold_has_no_tail
data.value: The Hold is missing a tail.

data.name: MgCrit_Invalid_AirSlide_parent
data.value: The specified AirSlide parent is invalid.

data.name: MgCrit_Invalid_Air_parent
data.value: The specified Air parent is invalid.

data.name: MgCrit_SoflanArea_has_no_tail
data.value: The SoflanArea is missing a tail.

data.name: Mg_Concurrent_ex_effects
data.value: Different EX effects coexist at the same tick: {0}. The game will only display one of these.

data.name: Mg_Head_BPM_not_found
data.value: No BPM change event was found at tick 0.

data.name: Mg_Head_Time_Signature_event_not_found
data.value: No Time Signature event was found at bar 0. Defaulting to a 4/4 time signature.

data.name: Mg_Length_smaller_than_unit
data.value: Nodes in the original lengthy note having spacing less than 1/{1}.

data.name: Mg_Main_timeline_not_found
data.value: There was no events found on main TIL {0}.

data.name: Mg_Meta_Argument_count_min_one
data.value: Command '{0}' requires at least one argument.

data.name: Mg_Meta_First_argument_must_int
data.value: First argument must be a valid integer.

data.name: Mg_No_sortname_provided
data.value: No SortName was provided. A new SortName has been generated from the Title.

data.name: Mg_Note_overlapped_in_different_TIL
data.value: This note overlaps with note in other TILs. This may cause problems in the scroll speed of this note.

data.name: Mg_Overlapping_air_parent_slide
data.value: Due to multiple overlapping Slide nodes existing simultaneously on this Air's position, it is unknown to determine from which Slide node the Air should start. Please try to space them apart in single ticks.

data.name: Mg_String_id_not_found
data.value: The specified StringID (id or str) {0} could not be found in '{1}'. Please check your input or run "Recollect Game Assets" to refresh the database. If you want to use your custom StringID, please provide both (i.e. "#meta ... [ID] [String]").

data.name: UserAssetSetup_Body
data.value: The latest game data is missing. You can scan a CHUNITHM game data folder now (optional), or skip and use only the built-in data. You can still re-import game assets later from the Misc tab.

data.name: UserAssetSetup_Processing
data.value: Importing game data. This may take a moment, please wait...

data.name: Warn_Duplicate_id_and_difficulty
data.value: Multiple charts with the same song ID and difficulty exist, the last scanned file will be used.

data.name: Warn_More_than_one_chart_marked_main
data.value: Multiple charts for this Song ID have been tagged with “#meta main” in their comments. The first chart found with this tag will be set as the baseline difficulty.

data.name: Warn_No_chart_marked_main
data.value: No baseline difficulty for this Song ID. Selecting the highest-difficulty chart by default. To choose a baseline difficulty explicitly, add `#meta main` to the comment of the chart.

data.name: Warn_Preview_later_than_120
data.value: The preview start time is set later than 120 seconds. This may cause the game to freeze when selecting the song.

data.name: Warn_We_chart_must_be_unique_id
data.value: World's End chart must use unique Song ID; otherwise, other difficulty charts will not display under common song categories.

data.name: C2s_Note_type_not_represented
data.value: C2S note type '{0}' is not represented by the current c2s model.

data.name: C2s_Parent_not_resolved
data.value: Could not resolve C2S parent '{0}' for note '{1}'.

data.name: C2s_Resolution_must_be_positive
data.value: C2S resolution must be greater than zero.

data.name: C2s_Version_line_not_found
data.value: C2S VERSION line was not found.

data.name: Cli_Arg_chart_file_discovery
data.value: Ordered chart formats to scan, for example [mgxc, ugc, sus] or [ugc, sus].

data.name: Cli_Arg_chart_input
data.value: Path to the source chart (.mgxc, .ugc, or .sus).

data.name: Cli_Arg_game_root
data.value: Directory to scan recursively for Music.xml and Stage.xml (typically the game or data install root).

data.name: Cli_Arg_input_directory
data.value: Directory containing chart files; includes options.json when --load-json is true (default).

data.name: Cli_Arg_jacket_output
data.value: Path to the output jacket file.

data.name: Cli_Arg_jacket_override
data.value: Override the jacket source path used for export.

data.name: Cli_Arg_jacket_override_chart
data.value: Override the jacket source path instead of using the path from the chart metadata.

data.name: Cli_Arg_music_output
data.value: Base folder for the exported music bundle files.

data.name: Cli_Arg_scan_directory
data.value: Directory containing chart files to scan recursively.

data.name: Cli_Arg_stage_audio_output
data.value: Base folder for cue file export.

data.name: Cli_Arg_texture_output
data.value: Folder to extract DDS files into.

data.name: Cli_Cmd_assets_collect
data.value: Scan game XML and merge entries into {0} under the per-user data directory (see {1}).

data.name: Cli_Cmd_chart_convert
data.value: Convert an MGXC, UGC, or SUS chart into a C2S chart file.

data.name: Cli_Cmd_media_audio
data.value: Convert the audio referenced by a chart into ACB/AWB assets.

data.name: Cli_Cmd_media_extract_afb
data.value: Extract DDS textures from an AFB archive.

data.name: Cli_Cmd_media_jacket
data.value: Convert the jacket referenced by a chart.

data.name: Cli_Cmd_media_stage
data.value: Build the custom stage referenced by a chart.

data.name: Cli_Cmd_music
data.value: Export an MGXC, UGC, or SUS chart with jacket and audio.

data.name: Cli_Cmd_music_export
data.value: Export chart, jacket, audio, and optional stage/event XML from one MGXC, UGC, or SUS chart.

data.name: Cli_Cmd_option
data.value: Export an option bundle from scanned charts, using options.json by default.

data.name: Cli_Cmd_option_convert
data.value: Scan charts and export the option bundle, using options.json by default or CLI configuration when --load-json is false.

data.name: Cli_Cmd_scan
data.value: Scan chart files in a folder.

data.name: Cli_Msg_batch_size_invalid
data.value: --batch-size must be -1 or a positive integer.

data.name: Cli_Msg_chart_extension_invalid
data.value: Expected a .mgxc, .ugc, or .sus chart file. Got extension: "{0}".

data.name: Cli_Msg_enable_export_action
data.value: Enable at least one of convert chart, jacket, audio, background, or event XML (in options.json or via CLI overrides).

data.name: Cli_Msg_no_charts_to_export
data.value: No charts were found to export.

data.name: Cli_Msg_no_export_actions_enabled
data.value: No export actions are enabled after applying options.json and command-line overrides.

data.name: Cli_Msg_option_name_required
data.value: Provide --option-name with exactly four characters when --load-json is false.

data.name: Cli_Msg_option_name_required_flag
data.value: With --load-json false, --option-name (exactly four characters) is required.

data.name: Cli_Opt_chart_file_discovery
data.value: Override options.json chartFileDiscovery with an ordered list, for example [mgxc, ugc, sus] or ugc,sus.

data.name: Cli_Opt_compact_json
data.value: Emit compact JSON instead of pretty-printed JSON.

data.name: Cli_Opt_dummy_acb
data.value: Override the dummy ACB template path.

data.name: Cli_Opt_effect_1
data.value: Optional first stage effect image path.

data.name: Cli_Opt_effect_2
data.value: Optional second stage effect image path.

data.name: Cli_Opt_effect_3
data.value: Optional third stage effect image path.

data.name: Cli_Opt_effect_4
data.value: Optional fourth stage effect image path.

data.name: Cli_Opt_load_json
data.value: When true (default), read options.json from the input directory. When false, skip the file and use defaults plus CLI flags; --option-name is then required.

data.name: Cli_Opt_notes_field_line_data
data.value: Override the notes field line entry data value.

data.name: Cli_Opt_notes_field_line_id
data.value: Override the notes field line entry ID.

data.name: Cli_Opt_notes_field_line_name
data.value: Override the notes field line entry name.

data.name: Cli_Opt_notes_field_template
data.value: Override the notes field template AFB path.

data.name: Cli_Opt_option_name
data.value: Four-letter bundle name. Required when --load-json is false; otherwise overrides options.json optionName.

data.name: Cli_Opt_output_format
data.value: Set the CLI output format. Defaults to json.

data.name: Cli_Opt_stage_background
data.value: Override the stage background image path.

data.name: Cli_Opt_stage_template
data.value: Override the stage template AFB path.

data.name: Cli_Opt_working_audio
data.value: Override the intermediate WAV path used during audio conversion.

data.name: Cli_Root_description
data.value: Command-line tools for chart conversion and asset export.

data.name: Error_Chart_discovery_must_be_array
data.value: Must be an array of chart formats.

data.name: Error_Chart_discovery_must_be_string_or_array
data.value: chartFileDiscovery must be a chart format list string or array.

data.name: Error_Chart_format_brackets_mismatch
data.value: Chart format lists must use matching [ and ] brackets.

data.name: Error_Chart_format_specify_at_least_one
data.value: Specify at least one chart format, for example [mgxc, ugc, sus] or [ugc, sus].

data.name: Error_Chart_format_unsupported
data.value: Unsupported chart format '{0}'. Supported values are mgxc, ugc, and sus.

data.name: Sus_Air_hold_ignored
data.value: SUS AIR-HOLD was ignored because no compatible parent note exists.

data.name: Sus_Air_hold_joint_ignored
data.value: SUS AIR-HOLD joint was ignored because no AIR-HOLD start was active.

data.name: Sus_Air_note_ignored
data.value: SUS AIR note was ignored because no compatible parent note exists.

data.name: Sus_Bpm_definition_not_found
data.value: SUS BPM definition '{0}' was not found.

data.name: Sus_Hold_joint_ignored
data.value: SUS HOLD joint was ignored because no HOLD start was active.

data.name: Sus_Slide_joint_ignored
data.value: SUS SLIDE joint was ignored because no SLIDE start was active.

data.name: Error_Release_github_failed
data.value: Could not retrieve release information from GitHub.

data.name: Error_Release_url_invalid
data.value: The release URL is not in a valid format.

data.name: Error_Release_version_invalid
data.value: The release version string is not in a valid format.

data.name: Error_Stage_background_required
data.value: A background path is required to build a stage.
